children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The term “base acres for peanuts” means the number of acres assigned to a farm pursuant to , as in effect on , subject to any adjustment under .section 7952 of this titlesection 8752 of this titleSeptember 30, 2007

children.heading: Covered commodities
children.label: B Covered commodities
children.text: The term “base acres”, with respect to a covered commodity, has the meaning given the term in .section 8711 of this title

children.heading: Counter-cyclical payment
children.label: 2 Counter-cyclical payment
children.text: The term “counter-cyclical payment” means a payment made to producers on a farm under section 8754 of this title.1See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: Direct payment
children.label: 3 Direct payment
children.text: The term “direct payment” means a direct payment made to producers on a farm under section 8753 of this title.1

children.heading: Effective price
children.label: 4 Effective price
children.text: The term “effective price” means the price calculated by the Secretary under section 8754 of this title for peanuts to determine whether counter-cyclical payments are required to be made under that section for a crop year.1

children.label: A
children.text: except as provided in subparagraph (B), 85 percent of the base acres of peanuts on a farm on which direct payments or counter-cyclical payments are made; and

children.label: B
children.text: in the case of direct payments for each of the 2009 through 2011 crop years, 83.3 percent of the base acres for peanuts on a farm on which direct payments are made.

children.heading: Payment yield
children.label: 6 Payment yield
children.text: The term “payment yield” means the yield established for direct payments and the yield established for counter-cyclical payments under , as in effect on , for a farm for peanuts.section 7952 of this titleSeptember 30, 2007

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The term “producer” means an owner, operator, landlord, tenant, or sharecropper that shares in the risk of producing a crop on a farm and is entitled to share in the crop available for marketing from the farm, or would have shared had the crop been produced.

children.label: i
children.text: not take into consideration the existence of a hybrid seed contract; and

children.label: ii
children.text: ensure that program requirements do not adversely affect the ability of the grower to receive a payment under this subchapter.

children.label: C
children.text: the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico; and

children.label: D
children.text: any other territory or possession of the United States.

children.heading: Target price
children.label: 9 Target price
children.text: The term “target price” means the price per ton of peanuts used to determine the payment rate for counter-cyclical payments.

children.heading: United States
children.label: 10 United States
children.text: The term “United States”, when used in a geographical sense, means all of the States.
